data.title: Powell’s rate cuts can’t rescue Washington from its trillion-dollar interest burden
data.description:
The U. S. government is still bleeding nearly $1 trillion every year just to cover interest payments on its debt, and that long-awaited rate cut from Jerome Powell isn’t going to change that. Roughly 80% of federal debt is made up of notes and bonds with terms locked in for anywhere from two to thirty years. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/powells-rate-cuts-washington-1t-interest/

data.title: Bitcoin price forecasts eye $110K target as $4.9T options expiry arrives
data.description:
Bitcoin gained fresh downward BTC price predictions on the back of an options expiry event and thickening bid liquidity on exchange order books.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-price-forecasts-110k-target-4-9t-options-expiry?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: U.S. Senator Elizabeth Warren writes to Treasury Secretary Bensont expressing concern about delaying anti-money laundering rules to 2028
data.description: According to market news: US Democratic Senator Elizabeth Warren and others wrote to US Treasury Secretary Benson to express concerns about postponing the anti-money laundering rules until 2028. (Jinshi)

data.title: The US SEC plans to comprehensively reform the information disclosure rules for listed companies, and Trump also calls for "quarterly reporting to semi-annual reporting."
data.description: U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission Chairman Paul Atkins announced on Friday that the agency will move forward with a comprehensive reform of investor disclosure rules for public companies. The same week the SEC announced this, Trump posted on social media that the SEC should change the frequency of public companies' financial reporting from "quarterly" to "semi-annual." Atkins stated, "Now is the time to examine the various channels through which information is obtained, how it is disseminated, and what disclosure methods meet the actual needs." He noted that many investors gain more information from earnings calls than from quarterly financial reports. Atkins also agreed with Trump, who has criticized the "quarterly reporting system for causing executives and management to focus excessively on short-term profits." (Jinshi)

data.title: EU Finance Ministers Agree on Digital Euro Holding Limits
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, finance ministers from European Union member states have reached an agreement on setting limits for individual holdings of the digital euro, marking a significant step towards the potential launch of a central bank digital currency (CBDC) in the region. This decision was announced during a Eurogroup press conference following the Economic and Financial Affairs Council meeting held in Copenhagen, Denmark. Officials confirmed that a consensus was achieved regarding the ceiling for holding limits and the issuance process for the digital euro.

During the press conference, it was clarified that the discussions focused on the procedures for establishing these holding limits rather than the specific limits themselves. This development comes amid calls from UK-based cryptocurrency advocacy groups urging their central bank to reconsider similar restrictions on stablecoin holdings. The European Central Bank (ECB) had previously addressed the issue of holding limits in its progress report on the digital euro, released at the end of 2024. The report highlighted ongoing debates between the ECB and national central banks over these limits.

Despite a global trend towards stablecoins, the European Union is intensifying its efforts to introduce a digital euro. Earlier this month, the ECB renewed its push for the digital currency, facing resistance from some EU members concerned about privacy and potential impacts on commercial banks. ECB board member Piero Cipollone assured that the system would allow all Europeans to make payments with a universally accepted digital means, even during major disruptions. He emphasized that the bank would not have access to information about the payer and payee, and the digital euro would function offline, preserving privacy akin to cash.

The ECB has been exploring the digital euro for years, potentially influenced by stablecoin regulations advocated by the Trump administration in the United States. In late July, ECB adviser Jürgen Schaaf proposed the digital euro as a strategic response to the growing prominence of dollar-based stablecoins. Similarly, Fabio Panetta, a former ECB official and Governor of the Bank of Italy, suggested in May that the digital euro could mitigate risks associated with the increasing adoption of cryptocurrencies. He argued that relying solely on rules and restrictions would be insufficient to manage the evolution of crypto-assets, positioning the digital euro as a crucial tool in addressing these challenges.

data.title: International Business Settlement Announces Cryptocurrency Mining Hardware Deal
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Hong Kong Stock Exchange has announced that International Business Settlement (00147.HK) has entered into agreements with Keen Golden Limited, a joint venture established to conduct cryptocurrency-related business, holding a 70% stake. The agreements involve the purchase of cryptocurrency mining hardware and other equipment or goods from Bitmain Technologies and Tecnoenergia Capital. The total post-tax consideration for these transactions is approximately $10.9 million.

data.title: Crypto stocks saw mixed gains and losses at the opening of the US stock market, with Bitmine up 5.06%.
data.description: According to MyStonks data, at the US stock market opening, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.15%, the S&P 500 rose 0.32%, and the Nasdaq rose 0.37%. Most crypto stocks rose, with Bitmine (AMEX: BMNR) up 5.06%, Circle (NYSE: CRCL) up 2.56%, ALT 5 Sigma (NASDAQ: ALTS) down 3.25%, and ETHZilla (NASDAQ: ETHZ) up 4.8%. MyStonks is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, including US stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: ZOOZ Power shareholders approve $180 million fundraising to build a Bitcoin treasury
data.description: ZOOZ Power, a dual-listed company on the Nasdaq and Tel Aviv Stock Exchanges, announced that its shareholders at a special shareholders meeting have approved the previously announced $180 million fundraising to establish a Bitcoin treasury. The company plans to use approximately 95% of the net proceeds from the fundraising (after repayment of outstanding promissory notes) to purchase and hold Bitcoin, making it the first company dual-listed on the Nasdaq and Tel Aviv Stock Exchanges to officially adopt a Bitcoin treasury reserve strategy. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Paxos Acquires NucleusEarn and Launches Paxos Labs
data.description: According to PANews, Paxos has announced the acquisition of NucleusEarn and the establishment of a new division, Paxos Labs. The new entity, co-founded by Chunda, Jun Kim, and Bhau, aims to provide on-chain financial infrastructure for businesses. Paxos Labs will offer a range of diversified crypto financial services, including stablecoin issuance and compliant money market solutions.

data.title: TerraAsset Announces Launch of TEA IDO on BNB Chain
data.description: TerraAsset, a provider of RWA tokenization infrastructure, announced the launch of its platform token, TEA, on the BNB Chain. According to TerraAsset, the platform is committed to driving the digital transformation of traditional financial assets through innovative blockchain technology solutions. Following the IDO, the protocol will enter a phase of ecosystem expansion, building a full-stack tokenization framework covering diverse assets such as real estate and commodities. This will enable on-chain mapping and segmentation of physical asset ownership, thereby improving the liquidity of traditional assets, lowering investment barriers, and providing global investors with a compliant, transparent, and efficient digital asset allocation channel.

data.title: Fintech startup Finary completes €25 million Series B funding round, with participation from PayPal Ventures
data.description: Finary, a wealth management fintech startup, announced the completion of a €25 million Series B funding round, with participation from PayPal Ventures, Y Combinator, Speedinvest, LocalGlobe, and Kima Ventures, as well as angel investors including Wise CTO Harsh Sinha and former UBS Chairman Axel Weber. The company's wealth management services include stocks, reserves, and life insurance, and it is also expanding the financial tools available to users to include cryptocurrency investments. (Techfundingnews)

data.title: A whale bought 21,966 ETH with 25x leverage, worth approximately $99.5 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, whale 0x89Da went long on 21,966 ETH (worth approximately $99.5 million) at 25x leverage nine hours ago. The whale had previously completed 53 trades with an 81.13% win rate, generating profits exceeding $2 million.

data.title: Bitcoin Traders Turn Defensive After U.S. Rate Cut
data.description:
Market data shows that %Bitcoin (CRYPTO: $BTC) traders have turned defensive after the U. S. Federal Reserve delivered a 25-basis point interest rate cut. Traders are hedging their exposure to
source: http://www.yolowire.com/latestarticles/21357/bitcoin-traders-turn-defensive-after-us-rate-cut

data.title: OpenAI plans to release its first hardware device in late 2026 or early 2027.
data.description: OpenAI has reached an agreement with Luxshare Precision to jointly produce future OpenAI equipment. OpenAI plans to launch its first hardware device in late 2026 or early 2027. It is reported that OpenAI is considering smart glasses, recording equipment and pin-type wearable devices. (The Information)

data.title: YZi Labs Announces Expansion of Stake in Ethena Labs
data.description: According to official news, YZi Labs announced the expansion of its holdings in Ethena Labs. YZi Labs' support will drive Ethena's next stage of growth, including deeper adoption of USDe on centralized and decentralized platforms, expansion on the BNB chain, and the development of new products such as USDtb (a fiat-backed stablecoin) and Converge (institutional settlement layer).

data.title: IP Token Treasury Firm Heritage Distilling to Change Nasdaq Stock Symbol to IPST
data.description: Heritage Distilling Holding Company, a Nasdaq-listed company employing an IP token treasury strategy, announced it will change its stock symbol from "CASK" to "IPST," effective at the open of trading on Monday, September 22, 2025. The CUSIP number for the company's common stock will remain unchanged. The company previously launched its "IP Strategy," which aims to accumulate Story-native IP tokens. This strategy is reportedly based on Heritage's recently announced $220 million PIPE financing. (Globenewswire)

data.title: IG Group to acquire crypto exchange Independent Reserve at an initial valuation of $117 million
data.description: FTSE 250 listed company IG Group announced that it plans to acquire Australian crypto exchange Independent Reserve at an initial valuation of $117 million. IG will reportedly pay approximately $72 million for an initial 70% stake in the cryptocurrency exchange, with the purchase price increasing to $82 million if the company achieves its performance targets for the 2026 fiscal year. The group also holds call options to purchase the remaining 30% stake based on performance in 2027 and 2028. (The Block)

data.title: Cango mined 149.1 BTC this week, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings to 5,567.3.
data.description: Cango, a Bitcoin mining company listed on the New York Stock Exchange, announced on the X platform that it mined 149.1 Bitcoins this week, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings to 5,567.3.

data.title: GBT Technologies to acquire digital asset trading platform operator Two Hands
data.description: GBT Technologies announced today that it intends to acquire Two Hands Corporation for $0.00625 per share. Notably, Two Hands just announced the official launch of its digital asset finance and trading division last month, partnering with More Money Ltd., a professional crypto asset investment advisory firm. More Money Ltd will reportedly serve as the primary operator and strategic advisor to Two Hands' trading division, providing a team of experts with extensive experience in cryptocurrency trading, blockchain startups, DeFi, and AI, offering strategic investment, swing trading, and analytical services. This acquisition will accelerate GBT's transformation into a commercial banking platform, but the transaction still requires regulatory and shareholder approval. (Globenewswire)

data.title: SEC Plans Comprehensive Reform of Disclosure Rules for Public Companies
data.description:
According to PANews, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Chairman Paul Atkins announced on Friday that the agency will advance a comprehensive reform plan for disclosure rules for public company investors. This announcement coincides with U.S. President Donald Trump's recent social media post suggesting that the SEC should change the frequency of financial disclosures from quarterly to semi-annually.

Atkins stated that it is an appropriate time to examine various channels of information access, methods of information dissemination, and what forms of disclosure meet actual needs. He highlighted that many investors gain more insights from earnings conference calls than from quarterly reports.

Furthermore, Atkins expressed agreement with President Trump's criticism that the quarterly reporting system causes corporate executives and management to focus excessively on short-term profits.
